message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

? *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
Internet's definitely sluggish, was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team, we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days, it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
Platform seems to be working correctly

For me its not at all loading
Facing issues while opening youtube, github as well
Hey @bob : ar eyou getting any issues from clients as well regarding this?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
let me take a look at the reports
Seems that the users are experiencing a few issues, some say they have slow load times, others say they cant access the site. And others are timing out due to the long load times
weird
For me its working fine

are you guys experiencing same things..
for me also it sworking fine
Complaints are rising up with random pattern
:star: Reproduces the incident
we'll take the incident first and try to look into it
I am seeing customer's rage on social media. @harsh.agarwal-ig.com is this someting you're looking into ?
*Incident Number INC100031:* sev2 issues with site loading
Is this a global issue ?
yes @bez we are on it
@bob : is it specific to a region or global?
:bulb: Form an effective investigation team
Seems to be a global issue
@Shay: can you please check anything is wrong from dev side
:star: Manage actions and timings
seems to be a global issue
:star: Qualify the problem
Not sure, for me even the logs are not loading up
@Tanya: can you look from platform side
Are there changes causing this issue ?
Sure i'm in
For me its working fine
These are the latest deployments : https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA
@MAya: any security concers can you please check
I'm checking infra logs for any slowness or timeouts
Hey @harsh.agarwal-ig.com , sure let me take a look

There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on. Could this be related to a change made?
@Bob: from when you are getting complaints
Reports from as far back as two weeks mention slow site performance and timeouts
But today the reports have spiked suddenly
when its spiking?
Around in last 20 mins
LOOKS LIKE THE DEPLOYMENT IS 24 hrs ago
:star: Check changes done to the platform
@Daniel: are you there?
I'm looking at Tanya's message about spike in outbound connections
Yes
Whats happening ?
can you check if logs are fine from app side
Checking...
Logs are filled with timeouts at the network layer, not in the app layer
can you confirm on this @tanya
This doesnt look like a deployment issue
@Tanya: its not looks like app issue
can you please check from network side
Where are with the investigation ?
@Maya: anything suspicious from your side
I think its more like an abnormal traffic to outside services. Maya could help us further
To me it looks like a security issue
Daniel you're right
it loks like some tarffic issue
Just ran a network security scan and our issues all seem to be related to our network switch trying to figure out what exactly
@Maya: can you please try to figure out the things asap please
Is this related to load on our platform ? As far as i know , there are no major events going on right now
complaints are increasing
I need infra support here. This is more into network layer
I'll help Maya
please
not load
Helping Maya now
issues all seem to be related to our network switch
Whats the customer impact so far ?
@Bob: complaints are rising?
Has the team figured out any solution?

investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside. It creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party
network switch had unpatched vulnerabilities, leaving it susceptible to known exploits. Attackers had exploited these vulnerabilities, leading to the compromise of the switch's integrity

they are on it @tinus ,
we'll be solving it asap
Complaints have risen to 130+ right now
And its increasing really bad
its basically creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party
@MAya: what should be the sol now?
Shall we try doing switch restart ?
any impact ?
Not sure how infra will react to it. it worked in previous org like this
@Tanya: can you suggest anything?
about infra
Security issue. My god. Is it a breach or a degradation?
@hamed : any suggestion from your side
i dont think a restart is best it can make things worse
Your right restarting the switch isnt the best option as it might intruduce some more issues
breach
Trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
If its breach then have they taken our PII data ?
This is not good
@maya @hamed @tanya please coordinate to get it resolved
i can see a redundant switch that we can use
@bez : team is trying to figure out the solution
@harsh.agarwal-ig.com lets failover to backup switch . What do you think ?
if its not impacting anything i'm fine with it
Should be fine
ok working on this now
great
please proceed
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
Good job, can we confirm @harsh.agarwal-ig.com?
great
@Bob: now can you help us with the reports
Customers have stopped reporting the issue, we are looking good
great
Good job guys
:bulb: Confirm resolution with the business
its resolved now
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
we are in a good condition
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
Great @harsh.agarwal-ig.com
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers, happy anniversary!
Really great job @harsh.agarwal-ig.com.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
